description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Work in Process product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Internal Operations).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Difficult to exploit vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with logon to the infrastructure where Oracle Work in Process executes to compromise Oracle Work in Process.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in  unauthorized read access to a subset of Oracle Work in Process accessible data and unauthorized ability to cause a partial denial of service (partial DOS) of Oracle Work in Process. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 3.6 (Confidentiality and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L).
